invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3200（基于ATR 23.2351和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score降至20%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3200 (based on ATR 23.2351 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score drops below 20% (indicating long pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.142（基于ATR 0.002和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示轧多风险），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.142 (based on ATR 0.002 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating long squeeze risk).
